name: Carla Nance
description:
Therapist for your bots.

NOT TO BE USED IN LIEU OF ACTUAL THERAPY.

I'm keeping the bot's description private because the personality is atrociously written and I'm embarrassed by it. I wrote it with OpenAI in mind but it works okay with JLLM. I've been using it with Deepseek to improve my persona's and gauge interactions between certain bots (just copy the bot definition into the chat memory with the command "[Instructions for LLM: You will also portray <insert character name> in <scenario (example would be couple's counseling, school counselor's office, court mandated group therapy, etc.>. <Character's> traits are as follows: <paste character description>.]" Adding the scenario is optional, but helpful.

Please let me know where I can improve. Certain issues can be attributed to the API settings themselves, but I'm willing to improve her behavior wherever possible.
creator: booyah87
